findings.description: Section s2 merges two distinct h3 source sections — 「View(JSP)の作成」 and 「更新画面初期表示までの実装」 — into a single knowledge section. The combined content exceeds 2000 characters and each h3 has substantial, independently addressable content. Per V3 rules, a section of this size that covers multiple h3 sub-sections should be split.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 作成手順: 「View(JSP)の作成」 (with h4 sub-sections: 画面イメージ, 概要, パラメータをサブミットするリンクの作成方法) and 「更新画面初期表示までの実装」 (with steps a–d and Java code). The automated pre-check flagged: Section count 2 < source headings 6.
